Interface DataRetrievalService

All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractDataRetrievalService, AcuwaveDataRetrievalService, FhirDataRetrievalService
public interface DataRetrievalService
This interface provides all the retrieval methods needed to supply the corona dashboard with the necessary data, regardless of the server type.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description

    getBatchSize()

  • Method Details

    • getObservations

      List<org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.Observation> getObservations(DataItemContext dataItemContext) throws org.springframework.web.client.RestClientException, OutOfMemoryError
      The retrieval of FHIR MiiObservation resources.
      Returns:
      A list of all FHIR observation resources that include a covid finding.
      Throws:
      org.springframework.web.client.RestClientException
      OutOfMemoryError

    • getObservations

      List<MiiObservation> getObservations(Collection<MiiEncounter> encounters, DataItemContext dataItemContext, List<String> loincCodes, QualitativeLabCodesSettings qualitativeLabCodesSettings) throws org.springframework.web.client.RestClientException, OutOfMemoryError
      The retrieval of FHIR MiiObservation resources via encounter resources.
      Returns:
      A list of all FHIR condition resources that include a covid diagnosis.
      Throws:
      org.springframework.web.client.RestClientException
      OutOfMemoryError

    • getConditions

      List<org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.Condition> getConditions(DataItemContext dataItemContext) throws org.springframework.web.client.RestClientException, OutOfMemoryError
      The retrieval of FHIR MiiCondition resources.
      Returns:
      A list of all FHIR condition resources that include a covid diagnosis.
      Throws:
      org.springframework.web.client.RestClientException
      OutOfMemoryError

    • getConditions

      List<MiiCondition> getConditions(Collection<MiiEncounter> encounters, DataItemContext dataItemContext) throws org.springframework.web.client.RestClientException, OutOfMemoryError
      The retrieval of FHIR MiiCondition resources via encounter resources.
      Returns:
      A list of all FHIR condition resources that include a covid diagnosis.
      Throws:
      org.springframework.web.client.RestClientException
      OutOfMemoryError

    • getPatients

      List<MiiPatient> getPatients(List<MiiObservation> ukbObservations, List<MiiCondition> ukbConditions, DataItemContext dataItemContext)
      The retrieval of FHIR MiiPatient resources.
      Parameters:
      ukbObservations - A list of all FHIR observation resources that include a covid finding.
      ukbConditions - A list of all FHIR condition resources that include a covid diagnosis.
      Returns:
      A list of all patient resources that have at least one covid observation and/or covid diagnosis.

    • getPatients

      List<MiiPatient> getPatients(Integer maxAgeAtCutOffDate, DataItemContext dataItemContext)
      The retrieval of MiiPatient resources that are younger than the specified age at the start of the reference date.
      Parameters:
      maxAgeAtCutOffDate - Maximum age in years at cut-off-date.
      Returns:
      A list of all valid patient resources that fulfil the criteria.

    • getPatients

      List<MiiPatient> getPatients(List<MiiProcedure> ukbProcedures, List<MiiCondition> ukbConditions)
      The retrieval of FHIR MiiPatient resources.
      Parameters:
      ukbProcedures - A list of all FHIR procedure resources that are concerned within the given context
      ukbConditions - A list of all FHIR condition resources.
      Returns:
      A list of all patient resources that have at least one positive inclusion criteria.

    • getEncounters

      List<MiiEncounter> getEncounters(DataItemContext dataItemContext)
      The retrieval of FHIR MiiEncounter resources.
      Returns:
      A list of all FHIR encounter resources of the detected patients after a specified cut-off date.

    • getEncounters

      List<MiiEncounter> getEncounters(DataItemContext dataItemContext, List<MiiPatient> patients)
      The retrieval of FHIR MiiEncounter resources.
      Returns:
      A list of all FHIR encounter resources of the detected patients after a specified cut-off date.

    • getEncounters

      List<MiiEncounter> getEncounters(PidTimestampCohortMap pidTimestampMap)
      The retrieval of FHIR MiiEncounter resources.
      Returns:
      A list of all FHIR encounter resources of the detected patients after a specified cut-off date.

    • getProcedures

      List<MiiProcedure> getProcedures(DataItemContext dataItemContext)
      The retrieval of FHIR MiiProcedure resources.
      Returns:
      A list of all requested FHIR procedure resources that contain artificial ventilation data for patients with at least one covid observation and/or covid diagnosis.

    • getProcedures

      List<MiiProcedure> getProcedures(Collection<MiiEncounter> encounters, DataItemContext dataItemContext)
      The retrieval of FHIR MiiProcedure resources.
      Returns:
      A list of all requested FHIR procedure resources that contain artificial ventilation data for patients with at least one covid observation and/or covid diagnosis.

    • getProcedures

      List<MiiProcedure> getProcedures(Collection<MiiEncounter> encounters, DataItemContext dataItemContext, Boolean activeEncountersOnly)
      The retrieval of FHIR MiiProcedure ventilation resources.
      Returns:
      A list of all requested FHIR procedure resources that contain artificial ventilation data.

    • getProcedures

      List<MiiProcedure> getProcedures(List<MiiEncounter> listMiiEncounters, List<MiiLocation> listMiiLocations, List<MiiObservation> listUkbObservations, List<MiiCondition> listUkbConditions, DataItemContext dataItemContext)
      The retrieval of FHIR MiiProcedure resources. The input resources are needed for a preprocessing filtering in the acuwave sided procedure data retrieval.
      Parameters:
      listMiiEncounters - A list of all FHIR encounter resources of the detected patients after a specified cut-off date.
      listMiiLocations - A list of all FHIR location resources that are referenced in any encounter resources.
      listUkbObservations - A list of all FHIR observation resources that include a covid finding.
      listUkbConditions - A list of all FHIR condition resources that include a covid diagnosis.
      Returns:
      A list of all requested FHIR procedure resources that contain artificial ventilation data for patients with at least one covid observation and/or covid diagnosis.

    • getLocations

      List<org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.Location> getLocations()
      The retrieval of FHIR MiiLocation resources.
      Returns:
      A list of all requested FHIR location resources.

    • getConsents

      List<MiiConsent> getConsents(Collection<MiiEncounter> encountersOutput)
      The retrieval of FHIR broad and acribis consent resources.
      Returns:
      A list of all requested FHIR consent resources.

    • getConsents

      List<MiiConsent> getConsents()
      The retrieval of FHIR broad consent resources.
      Returns:
      A list of all requested FHIR consent resources.

    • getQuestionnaireResponses

      List<MiiQuestionnaireResponse> getQuestionnaireResponses(List<String> patients)
      The retrieval of FHIR MiiQuestionnaireResponse ventilation resources.
      Returns:
      A list of all requested FHIR questionnaire response resources that are used to gather acribis follow-up information.

    • getServerType

      ServerTypeEnum getServerType()
      Retrieval of the used server type.
      Returns:
      The used server type of the data retrieval service (e.g. ServerTypeEnum.FHIR)

    • getBatchSize

      int getBatchSize()
      Retrieval of the used batch size defined in the FhirSearchConfiguration class.
      Returns:
      The configured batch size of the parallelized partial FHIR searches

    • getIcuEncounters

      List<org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.Encounter> getIcuEncounters() throws SearchException
      Throws:
      SearchException

      List<CoreBaseDataItem> getIcuEpisodes(Collection<String> caseIds) throws SearchException
      Throws:
      SearchException

    • getUkbRenalReplacementObservations

      List<CoreBaseDataItem> getUkbRenalReplacementObservations(Collection<String> encounterIds, Set<Integer> codes)

    • getStatus
